## How it was tested

## Checklist

- [ ] New decision logic lives in a pure class with a unit test (see
      `DwellMachine` / `MenuGeometry` and CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Android classes stayed thin wrappers
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (README / ARCHITECTURE / CHANGELOG)
